lines.note: B line is closed on the backend CriticalPathSnapshot truth; store-level legacy criticalPathSummary has been removed and criticalPath.ts is now explicitly documented as snapshot/override/fallback utility only.
C line is closed as a standalone license page; legacy certificate-approvals has been demoted to compatibility status and work-item creation is now atomic.

D line is closed on the current acceptance timeline scope; dependency cycle detection, record updates, catalog-in-use protection, depends_on compatibility demotion, and H-D6 Phase 2 weak dual-axis flow-board layout have all landed.
A line is now closed through DW.9a; migration numbering is monotonic again and the special-management/reports old-entry cleanup has been absorbed back into the completed delivery line.

special_plan_rollup.note: Use special_plan_rollup as the authoritative four-line summary. Raw range counts across steps still include historical placeholder steps, so dashboards should prefer this rollup over naive prefix counting.

hardening_backlog.note: The active A/B/C/D hardening sprint is closed: repo-wide server build, client build, and client tsc are green, and H-D6 Phase 2 has landed. Remaining entries are future-only schema or UX follow-ups rather than current blockers.

items.summary: Resolved: duplicate migration numbering was removed and the active sequence is now monotonic.
Resolved: special-management shell normalization, reports entry cleanup, and old Drawings entry cleanup were completed in DW.9 / DW.9a.
Resolved: the legacy store-level criticalPathSummary string contract was removed.
Resolved: criticalPath.ts is now explicitly positioned as snapshot/override/fallback utility rather than a main truth path.
Resolved: certificate-approvals is now explicitly documented as a legacy compatibility route, not the license main chain.
Resolved: certificate-work-items POST now uses an atomic database function instead of manual rollback.
Resolved: certificate type order/labels/display config now come from a shared registry with stable unknown-type fallback, and full client tsc is green again.
Resolved: preMilestoneBoardService syntax/build integrity has been restored and server build is green again.
Resolved: canonical acceptance route mounting and compatibility aliases are now explicitly documented.
Resolved for current scope: acceptance_plans.depends_on has been demoted to compatibility sync, while acceptance_dependencies remains the canonical write path.
Resolved: acceptance-records now supports update writes.
Resolved: acceptance dependency creation now blocks cycles with DEPENDENCY_CYCLE_DETECTED.
Partially resolved: runtime CATALOG_IN_USE protection is in place; a future schema-hardening pass can still add a database-level FK/constraint.

Phase 1 and Phase 2 are complete: AcceptanceTimeline now uses a thinner page shell plus FlowBoard/Ledger/DetailDrawer, the board has stronger unscheduled/blocked/dependency readability, and month/biweek/week time scales now drive a weak dual-axis layout with stable unscheduled placement. Any future Phase 3 work is optional deeper UX polish rather than a delivery blocker.

three_file_summary.note: This summary only covers the three execution documents: 业务流程优化实施专项方案.md, 页面导航收口实施专项方案.md, and 计划编制实施专项方案.md. It excludes DW/11/12/13 and excludes 10.0/10.3-10.7 from this three-file scope.
